stemHtml: Two places are situated on the same parallel in the Southern Hemisphere. The great circle, rhumb line and the straight line between these places are drawn on a Polar Stereographic Projection. Which statement is correct?

options.a: The great circle is situated between the parallel and the straight line, because the concave side of the great circle is always pointed towards the equator.
options.b: The great circle is situated between the parallel and the straight line, because the concave side of the great circle is always pointed towards the pole.
options.c: The correct sequence from North to South is: Great circle, straight line, rhumb line.
options.d: The rhumb line is situated between the great circle and the straight line because the shortest distance between to places on Earth is the great circle.
